description: Advanced Web Ranking is an SEO rank tracking and visibility platform for agencies and in-house teams. It provides tracked keyword rankings, SERP and market share data, reporting, and related SEO analysis features.
summary: Advanced Web Ranking exposes two HTTP API endpoints under its Developer API/Market Share API, authenticated with an AWR API token, plus a remote MCP server at https://api.advancedwebranking.com/mcp using OAuth and documented support for manually generated MCP keys.

surfaces.name: Advanced Web Ranking Market Share API
